Our Services

Professional tree service solutions for every need

Tree Pruning

Enhance the health, beauty, and safety of your trees with professional pruning services.

Learn More →

Tree Removal

Safely and efficiently remove trees that are hazardous, diseased, or unwanted.

Learn More →

Stump Grinding

Remove unsightly tree stumps and reclaim your yard with our professional stump grinding services.

Learn More →

Tree Planting

Enhance your property and the environment with our professional tree planting services.

Learn More →

Emergency Tree Service

24/7 emergency tree services for storm damage, fallen trees, and other urgent situations.

Learn More →

Tree Risk Assessment

Identify potential hazards and protect your property with our comprehensive tree risk assessment services.

Learn More →
The Small World Tree Company

Trusted tree service professionals serving San Francisco, CA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
